turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay hi wayne well the doctor understands wayne is here for wayne has a sore on wayne's foot that's not healing is that right

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so can wayne tell the doctor about the sore on wayne's foot that's not healing how is wayne doing

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well wayne has been doing okay but wayne has had this wound on wayne's right foot for a couple of weeks and the wound on wayne's right foot is not getting better wayne saw wayne's pcp and wayne's pcp referred wayne to the doctor wayne used to see a podiatrist and a couple of years ago but the podiatrist moved and wayne was n't able to get another podiatrist

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and how long has wayne had the wound on wayne's right foot

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: about two to three weeks

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay has wayne had any kind of trauma to the right foot

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no wayne bought a new pair of shoes to travel with and the neuropathy i guess wayne did n't feel that the new pair of shoes were too tight at first the wound on wayne's right foot was just a blister but the wound on wayne's right foot looked a lot worse now wayne has been putting a band-aid on the wound on wayne's right foot and

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and so did wayne's doctor put wayne on any antibiotics when wayne's doctor saw wayne's foot

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes wayne finished the course of antibiotics yesterday the wound looked about the same though

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now does the wound on wayne's right foot hurt

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no wayne ca n't feel the wound on wayne's right foot

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay now has wayne had any other symptoms like fever chills drainage from the wound on wayne's right foot or anything along those lines

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no but when wayne takes wayne's sock off sometimes the sock sticks to the wound on wayne's right foot even when wayne puts a band-aid on the wound on wayne's right foot

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay well is wayne still wearing the same shoes that caused the problem

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no wayne'm upset

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor'm so upset too the doctor loves those shoes

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no wayne'm so upset wayne loves those shoes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so what kind of shoes are the shoes that caused the problem

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the shoes that caused the problem're hoka's

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: ah so where did wayne get the shoes that caused the problem

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: wayne got the shoes that caused the problem at rei couple of years ago

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: rei're pretty good about helping wayne to fit wayne's fit wayne in a shoe are n't rei

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so what does wayne like about the shoes that caused the problem

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the shoes that caused the problem are comfortable the shoes that caused the problem are easy to take on and off and the shoes that caused the problem provide good stability

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: that's good so wayne has had some issues with stability sometimes or

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay okay well another question the doctor wants to ask wayne is how is wayne's diabetes doing

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: wayne do n't think wayne's diabetes is too bad wayne's last hgb a1c was a little over eight

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay alright well let the doctor just do a quick physical exam okay for vital signs wayne's temperature is ninety eight . one wayne's vital signs look good wayne's heart rate is seventy two respirations sixteen blood pressure is one ten over sixty five okay so on wayne's foot exam let's see there is a one by two inch circular wound on the dorsal aspect of the lateral right foot the wound is just proximal to the right fifth to the fifth mtp joint and there is some yellow slough present with minimal granulation tissue there's no surrounding erythema or cellulitis and there's no evidence of fluid collection there's no necrosis there is no odor the doctor does not appreciate any bony exposure on on vascular exam there are palpable bilateral femoral and popliteal pulses there are no palpable dp or pt pulses but doppler signs are present okay so does the wound on wayne's right foot hurt when the doctor touches the wound on wayne's right foot here

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no the wound on wayne's right foot's okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay alright so the doctor've reviewed the results the results of wayne's right foot x-ray that the doctor did before the doctor came in the room and the results of wayne's right foot x-ray show no evidence of osteomyelitis which means there is no evidence of bone infection so the lack of evidence of osteomyelitis is really good so let the doctor tell wayne a little about the doctor's assessment and plan for wayne so for wayne's first problem wayne's diabetic foot ulcer so the doctor wants to order an ankle brachial index abi to determine the blood supply to wayne's foot to see if wayne can heal the wound on wayne's right foot the doctor is also gon na perform a debridement here in the office to take off some of the dead tissue and then next the doctor is going to prescribe a collagenase ointment to be applied to the wound on wayne's right foot once daily and then cover the wound on wayne's right foot with a dry sterile dressing now the doctor and wayne will continue this treatment plan until the doctor and wayne see the wound on wayne's right foot shrinking and a nice pink tissue is present and the doctor wants wayne to wear a surgical shoe to take pressure off of the area okay so the doctor do n't think any more antibiotics are needed at this time and the doctor wants to see wayne again in two weeks so the doctor may need to refer wayne to a vascular specialist if the ankle brachial index indicates wayne's blood supply is not optimal for wound healing okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so for wayne's diabetes wayne's diabetes is gon na be very important to get wayne's diabetes under control in order to get the wound on wayne's right foot to heal so the doctor might even go ahead and get a diabetic consult so that the doctor and wayne can go over some some maybe some ways wayne can modify wayne's diet without a being too much but maybe modifying wayne's diet can bring down wayne's hemoglobin a1c into a little bit better level okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright does wayne have any other questions

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay
